emails.subject: Welcome to Greenway — here is what to expect
emails.body:
Hi there,

Thanks for joining the Greenway Energy newsletter. Over the next few weeks we'll share research notes and market commentary.

If this isn't useful, you can unsubscribe at any time: https://greenway.example/unsubscribe?u=123

Greenway Energy Capital
3100 Dick Pond Road, Suite 200
Myrtle Beach, SC 29588

emails.subject: ACT NOW!!! 100% FREE BONUS INSIDE
emails.body:
CONGRATULATIONS! You are a WINNER. This limited time offer is 100% free and risk-free. Act now to claim your free cash bonus and make money fast. Buy now, this is not spam. Guarantee satisfaction guaranteed!

Click here: https://promo.example/win

emails.subject: RE: your free trial
emails.body:
